This report maps repo-reviewed skill source pins to body-free git provenance. It reports source-pin paths, source kind, trust level, install mode, match/hash state, risk metadata, tracked state, dirty state, last commit IDs/dates, and commit-subject hashes only; raw source-pin YAML, raw source refs, skill bodies, issue bodies, comments, prompts, git subjects, author identities, provider payloads, installer output, and secret values are not included.
